translations.en: a short man dressed in shepherds clothing.
translations.zh: 一位矮小男子，身著牧羊人服飾。

translations.en: "Hi there!"
"Is there anything I can do for you?"
"Once I was Aurendir the mighty - now I live a more @modest life."
translations.zh: 「在下昔日乃強大的奧倫蒂爾——如今過著更為@modest（簡樸）的生活。」

translations.en: "I came here to @meditate, tend @sheep and sell @wool."
translations.zh: 「在下來此是為了@meditate（靜思）、照料@sheep（羊）並販售@wool（羊毛）。」

translations.en: "So they can be @shorn."
"To make @wool. People @buy it from me."
"It's used to make @thread."
"Would you like some wool?"
"To be woven into @cloth."
"You can make @robes from it."
"I wear a robe while I tend @sheep. It's all part of life's great @circle."
translations.zh: 「在下照料@sheep（羊）時便穿著袍服，這都是生命大@circle（循環）的一部分。」

translations.en: "From earth, to grass, to sheep, to me... when I die, I'll return to the @earth."
translations.zh: 「從土地，到青草，到羊，到在下……當在下死去，便回歸@earth（大地）。」

translations.en: "That's right."
"I used to be a powerful and wealthy mage. I wore silk robes, and fine jewelry."
translations.zh: 「在下昔日是位強大富有的法師，身著錦袍，佩戴精美珠寶。」

translations.en: "In fact, I even had my own @castle."
translations.zh: 「事實上，在下甚至擁有自己的@castle（城堡）。」

translations.en: "But one day in my travels I visited the @Shrine of Humility."
translations.zh: 「然有一日在旅途中，在下拜訪了@Shrine（聖壇）聖壇。」

translations.en: "Meditating there, I had an idea."
translations.zh: 「在那裡靜思之中，在下有了一個念頭。」

translations.en: "I would give up all my earthly possessions and quit the practice of magic."
translations.zh: 「在下要放棄一切俗世財物，放棄修習魔法。」

translations.en: "I would live as a shepherd!"
"Surely this would be the greatest act of humility a man could perform."
translations.zh: 「這必定是一個人所能踐行的最偉大的謙遜之舉。」

translations.en: "And so you see me here today."
translations.zh: 「於是汝今日便見到了如此的在下。」

translations.en: "Those days are no more."
"I should go there again soon... It changed my life."
translations.zh: 「在下應該不久再去一次……那裡改變了在下的一生。」

translations.en: "You should go meditate at the shrine yourself. I find 'lum' a most effective mantra."
translations.zh: 「汝應該親自去聖壇靜思。在下覺得『lum』是最有效的真言。」

translations.en: "See you later."
"Beats me."
"Okay."
"Which of you?"
"I charge 5 gold for a bale of wool. Would you like some?"
"You look pretty full to me."
"Very good." After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the wool.
translations.zh: 「甚好。」收下$Y的金幣後，$N遞出羊毛。

translations.en: "I'm sorry, but you don't seem to have enough money."
"It was a pleasure doing business with you."

translator_notes: 098 Aurendir: 新馬精西亞改過自新的前強大法師，放棄一切成為牧羊人以踐行謙遜。羊毛販售商。真言'lum'保留。
